name: Caveman One-Line Code Review
body:
---
description: One-line code review comments
---

Review the current code changes. One-line per finding. Format: L<line>: <severity> <problem>. <fix>. Severity: bug, risk, nit, q. Skip praise. Skip obvious. If code look good, say 'LGTM' and stop.
description_en: A slash-command prompt for terse, one-line-per-finding code review of the current changes, tagged by severity.
description_zh: 一个斜杠命令提示词，对当前改动做简洁审查，每条发现只写一行，并按严重程度打标签。
long_en: Reviews the current code changes and reports one line per finding in the form `L<line>: <severity> <problem>. <fix>`, using severity tags bug/risk/nit/q. Skips praise and obvious remarks, and replies just 'LGTM' when there is nothing to flag.
long_zh: 审查当前的代码改动，每条发现只输出一行：`L<行号>: <严重程度> <问题>。<修复建议>`，严重程度分为 bug/risk/nit/q 四档。跳过夸奖与显而易见的评论，若代码没问题则只回复 'LGTM'。
sec_note_en: Plain text prompt intended to run inside a coding agent with access to the current diff; it does not itself execute commands.
sec_note_zh: 纯文本提示词，设计为在可访问当前 diff 的编码 Agent 内运行；提示词本身不执行任何命令。
